product: Databricks usage dashboard is now generally available
tagline: The usage dashboard is now generally available.
what_it_does: The usage dashboard is now generally available. Account admins can import customizable, pre built usage dashboards to monitor their Databricks usage at the account and workspace levels. This article explains how to import pre built usage dashboards to your workspaces to monitor account and workspace level usage.
why_it_matters: Usage Dashboard version 2.0 (Preview): includes cost forecasting and object level cost drill down.
key_takeaway: The usage dashboard is now generally available.
